'''tanugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dle|dle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-n-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dle|dle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tanugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tænigith|tænigith]] || [[word:tænigij|tænigij]] || [[word:tænigish|tænigish]] || [[word:tænigi|tænigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tanunuguth|tanunuguth]] || [[word:tanunuguj|tanunuguj]] || [[word:tanunugush|tanunugush]] || [[word:tanunugu|tanunugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tanuguth|tanuguth]] || [[word:tanuguj|tanuguj]] || [[word:tanugush|tanugush]] || [[word:tanugu|tanugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tanufguth|tanufguth]] || [[word:tanufguj|tanufguj]] || [[word:tanufgush|tanufgush]] || [[word:tanufguf|tanufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tanuguthu|tanuguthu]] || [[word:tanuguju|tanuguju]] || [[word:tanugushu|tanugushu]] || [[word:tanuguku|tanuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tanuguth|tanuguth]] || [[word:tanuguj|tanuguj]] || [[word:tanugush|tanugush]] || [[word:tanugu|tanugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tanuguthul|tanuguthul]] || [[word:tanugujul|tanugujul]] || [[word:tanugushul|tanugushul]] || [[word:tanugukul|tanugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tanuguthuthu|tanuguthuthu]] || [[word:tanugujuju|tanugujuju]] || [[word:tanugushushu|tanugushushu]] || [[word:tanuguku|tanuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tanuguthun|tanuguthun]] || [[word:tanugujun|tanugujun]] || [[word:tanugushun|tanugushun]] || [[word:tanugukun|tanugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tanuguthuoro|tanuguthuoro]] || [[word:tanugujuoro|tanugujuoro]] || [[word:tanugushuoro|tanugushuoro]] || [[word:tanugukuoro|tanugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
